name: cancel-pre-first-token
description: Scenario A / I2 cancellation point 1 (before first token) — derived from the inferbench IB-T004 profile (inferbench@caa5074 docs/evidence/ib-t004/cancel-pre-first-token/workload.json; name/seed kept, unchanged), run against the composed Scenario A stack. Mock ttft=300ms; every request cancels at 0.15s elapsed, before the first token arrives. Expected: client events status=canceled with 0 output tokens and no TTFT; mock /debug/state aborts phase=pre_first_token, chunks_sent=0.
